stemHtml:
Consider the following METAR and SPECI observations:

METAR EGVN 061450Z 22004KT 9999 VCTS-SHRA SCT060CB BKN100 28/16 Q1016 BECMG 27015G30KT
SPECI EGVN 061512Z 18007KT 6000 TSRA SCT060CB BKN100 27/15 Q1016 BECMG 27015G30KT

Why was the SPECI was issued? Because of the...

options.a: Change of surface wind speed and direction, with the consequence that aircraft performance calculations may need to be revised.
options.b: Reduction in air temperature, with the consequence that aircraft performance calculations may need to be revised.
options.c: Onset of a thunderstorm and the associated change in intensity of precipitation.
options.d: Reduction in visibility caused by the change in intensity of precipitation.
